description: Pre-existing DeepInit output for lifecycle mode testing

lint_fresh.setup: No changes needed — hashes are stale (won't match real sha256), so all components will appear changed
lint_fresh.expected: All components reported as stale (hashes are fake placeholder values)

update_billing_change.setup: Edit src/billing/invoice.ts (add a comment or change a value)

update_no_changes.description: Run --update after updating hashes to match current files
update_no_changes.setup: Recompute real sha256 hashes and update .file_hashes.json
update_no_changes.expected: Reports 'No changes detected' and exits quickly

expected_behavior: Scans code comments for decision language
Does NOT run full Wave 2 analysis

new_component.description: Add new directory src/reports/ with a file, run --update

expected_behavior: billing.md references src/billing/payment.ts — file not found
Reports broken reference in lint output
billing component reported as CRITICAL (file deleted)
